spec.title: vLLM: Token Throughput
spec.description: Number of tokens processed per second

spec.title: vLLM: Finish Reason
spec.description: Number of finished requests by their finish reason: either an EOS token was generated or the max sequence length was reached.

spec.title: vLLM: Requests Prefill and Decode Time
vLLM: Max Generation Token in Sequence Group
Distribution of Requests Per Model Last 24 Hours
vLLM: Time Per Output Token Latency

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))

(sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))

spec.title: Peak Tokens Per Second Per Model Last 24 Hours
Avg Total Tokens Per Request Last 7 Days
Avg Total Tokens Per Request Per Model Last 7 Days
Tokens Per Request Per Model Last 7 Days
vLLM: Prefix Cache Hit Rate
spec.description: Percentage of prefix cache queries that resulted in a cache hit (GPU).

spec.title: vLLM: Cache Utilization
spec.description: Percentage of used cache blocks by vLLM.

spec.title: SpecDecoding: Accepted vs Drafted Throughput
spec.description: Speculative Decoding metrics showing draft and accepted token rates

spec.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_accepted_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) / sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_draft_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) * 100

spec.title: SpecDecoding: Accepted vs Drafted Tokens
spec.description: Total accepted and drafted tokens in speculative decoding

spec.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_accepted_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) / sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_draft_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) * 100

spec.title: SpecDecoding: Mean Acceptance Length
spec.description: Mean number of drafts per speculation

spec.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_draft_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) / sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_drafts_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))

spec.title: SpecDecoding: Mean Acceptance Length
spec.description: Mean number of drafts per speculation

spec.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_draft_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])) / sum by (model_name) (rate(vllm:spec_decode_num_drafts_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))

spec.title: vLLM: Time To First Token Latency
spec.description: P50, P90, P95, and P99 TTFT latency.

spec.expr:
(sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))

spec.title: vLLM: E2E Request Latency
spec.description: Latency from request start to first token returned (in seconds).

spec.expr:
sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval]))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, engine) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", engine=~"$workerid", }[$interval])))

spec.title: vLLM: Scheduler State
spec.description: Number of requests in RUNNING, WAITING, and SWAPPED state

spec.name: datasource
spec.description: Filter queries of a specific Prometheus type.
